DARV.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHARAC: There's so much stuff here... so many shiny stones.
Haha! Seems like gems can't light up your eyes either! Come, pick one out!
You don't seem to want anything in particular... well, take a look around. I'm in no rush.
I've got a million gems here, yet none of them seem to make you stop...

Fine, just as you say. Let me pick one at random.
[i][font_size=22]Yuno casually picks up an unremarkable stone.[/font_size][/i]
Hahaha! You just took the best one I've got!
NEOW.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHARAC: Awake again... Must I repeat this once more...
If you have something to give me... never mind... you don't have what I want.

[sine]...go on... 
..the top... the bottom... ..it doesn't matter... we'll meet again.....[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_C: A dazzling room. You're so radiant. I have nothing... but I need nothing either...
Oh my, even someone with nothing can glow when I shine my light on them.
Your desireless nature intrigues me. Come, let me dress you up a little.
Even if you feel nothing is worth wanting, you should at least look presentable.

You certainly don't have what I seek... but do as you please.
[i][font_size=22]Yuno stands still, like a hollow statue someone forgot to paint.[/font_size][/i]
Tsk, what a charmless girl. Take it — this is the last bit of enthusiasm I have left.
OROBAS.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHAR: You jump so high. Are you dancing for someone?
Here!! Only me here! Fluffy fluffy!
What do you want? I've got tons of good stuff here!!
From another world? Cool, cool! What's it like there?
So many interesting things! The little fuzzy one knows so much!Good! Good!! These are my gifts to you!!
PAEL.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHARAC: Your snoring is so steady. Like the last thing in this world that still has a rhythm.
[thinky_dots]Your heart is quieter than mine... take it, a gift for the tranquil...[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]Those who neither fight nor grasp travel the farthest... You're not planning to leave at all, are you?[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]My flesh won't rush you... it will only keep you company in your daze...[/thinky_dots]

...Pain, sleep, waking. They're all more or less the same.
[i][font_size=22]Yuno's voice is feather-light, as if speaking of something that has nothing to do with her.[/font_size][/i]
[thinky_dots]Take it... let you keep sitting here... watching the tides rise and fall, without ever getting your feet wet...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHARAC: You want a fight. I refuse.
[b]You cannot refuse!! Take this weapon! Go fight!!![/b]
[b]Your blood is still warm! Since you're alive, swing once and let me see it![/b]

If you must fight, then fight.
[i][font_size=22]Yuno lowers her blade toward the ground, as if casually setting a battle aside.[/font_size][/i]
[b]Take it. This blade is your spoils. Keep moving forward — don't look back![/b]
TEZCATARA.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_C: The fire is warm. But I have nothing that needs thawing.
You don't need anything to warm your hands. Come in, let me [jitter][b]thaw[/b][/jitter] you a little in this boredom.
You're so hollow inside — did you pack up and ship away even your [jitter][b]emotions[/b][/jitter]?
Try this [jitter][b]pastry[/b][/jitter]. The kind you don't need to rush to finish.

...Taste or no taste, it's all the same to me. But since you've handed it over.
[i][font_size=22]Yuno takes it, taking only a single bite.[/font_size][/i]
What an interesting child. Then just hold it — and let it slowly [jitter][b]cool[/b][/jitter].
VAKUU.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YUNO_CHARA: Even demons make deals. My soul... take it if you want.
A [sine]soul[/sine] barely used... fetches the highest price, you know...
You have no interest in bargaining at all? That [sine]hollow[/sine] attitude of yours — truly fascinating.
If the contract bore only a single word — [sine]"Nothing"[/sine] — would you sign?

"Nothing" is a good word. Carries more weight than my own name. Sign it.
[i][font_size=22]Her signature is as light as a pen without ink, leaving an invisible scratch on the paper.[/font_size][/i]
Fascinating! I've never seen anyone sign [sine]nothingness[/sine] with such conviction. Take it — this is the price of your emptiness.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.YUNO_MOD_CHARACTER_YU: You don't belong here? Why have you come to see me?
Home? Impossible. I have no reason to tell you.
Still not giving up? I act only to maintain order.
The Spire remembers you. You've come many times. How tenacious. How many more times will it take?
